nasb.text: All Your garments are fragrant with myrrh and aloes and cassia; Out of ivory palaces stringed instruments have made You glad.

esv.text: your robes are all fragrant with myrrh and aloes and cassia. From ivory palaces stringed instruments make you glad;

cnv.text: 你的衣服都有沒藥、沉香和肉桂的香氣； 從象牙宮裡有絲弦的樂聲，使你歡喜。

ccb.text: 你的衣袍散发出没药、沉香和肉桂的芬芳， 你陶醉在象牙宫的弦乐中。

csbs.text: 你所有的衣服都有没药、沉香、桂皮的香气， 在象牙宫殿里有丝弦乐器声使你欢喜。
